basic_details.job_title: Rajasthan Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 105 Anganwadi Worker & Helper Posts in Ajmer District
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the Deputy Director, Women and Child Development Department, Ajmer
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the Deputy Director, Women and Child Development Department, Ajmer, has issued Notice No. 06/2026 (Reference No. WCD/DD/AJM/CHAYAN/2026-00076-9906991/) inviting applications for vacant posts of Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker) and Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) on a voluntary, honorarium-based (मानदेय) service basis. These posts are spread across Anganwadi Centres run under 12 Child Development Project (CDPO) offices in Ajmer district. This article presents an English translation of the notice along with the complete project-wise vacancy details, important dates, and the application p

important_dates.notice issue date: As per date of digital signature (25 June 2026, per office record)

age_limit.age_details: Voluntary, honorarium-based (मानदेय) service - not a salaried government post
age_limit.details: The notice uploaded and translated here does not specify the following details: | Educational qualification required for Anganwadi Karyakartri or Sahayika posts Age limit or age relaxation Monthly honorarium (मानदेय) amount for either post Detailed eligibility/selection criteria | The notice explicitly states that such detailed eligibility information is available on the departmental website, http://www.wcd.rajasthan.gov.in. Candidates should refer to that website or contact the relevant CDPO office (numbers listed above) for these details rather than assuming any criteria.

qualification.details: The notice uploaded and translated here does not specify the following details: | Educational qualification required for Anganwadi Karyakartri or Sahayika posts Age limit or age relaxation Monthly honorarium (मानदेय) amount for either post Detailed eligibility/selection criteria | The notice explicitly states that such detailed eligibility information is available on the departmental website, http://www.wcd.rajasthan.gov.in . Candidates should refer to that website or contact the relevant CDPO office (numbers listed above) for these details rather than assuming any criteria.

how_to_apply: Obtain the application form as prescribed by the department (format not included in the uploaded notice - check the departmental website or the relevant CDPO office).
Attach all required supporting documents to the application (specific list of documents is not detailed in the uploaded notice).

Submit the hard copy of the application, along with attached documents, in person to the office of the Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) relevant to the project/area of the vacancy you are applying for.
Applications must be submitted between 25 June 2026 and 24 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM.
Applications received after this period will not be accepted under any circumstances.
For general queries about the notice, contact the relevant project office's phone number during office hours on government working days.

Note: This notice specifies only an offline (hard copy, in-person) submission process to the respective CDPO office. No online application portal or email-based submission process is mentioned in the notice for candidates.
important_instructions: The hard copy of the application, along with all attached/supporting documents, must be submitted in person at the office of the concerned Child Development Project Officer. The application window is strictly from 25 June 2026 to 24 July 2026, till 5:00 PM. No applications will be accepted after this deadline. For general information about the notice, candidates can contact the listed phone numbers during office hours on government working days. Detailed information regarding project-wise, Anganwadi-centre-wise, Gram Panchayat-wise, and ward-wise vacancies and eligibility can be obtained from the departmental website: http://www.wcd.rajasthan.gov.in. The issuing authority (Deputy Director, Women and Child Development Department, Ajmer) reserves the right to amend, delete, or cancel this notice in any manner, at any time.

rows.details: Office of the Deputy Director, Women and Child Development Department, Ajmer
Near New RPSC, Bandhiya Gaon Road, Ajmer
Voluntary, honorarium-based (मानदेय) service - not a salaried government post
12 CDPO project areas in Ajmer district
Offline - hard copy submitted in person to the respective CDPO office

content_sections.heading: Ajmer Anganwadi Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: The notice does not mention any separate dates for a written exam, interview, merit list, or selection result. Selection procedure details beyond the application stage are not specified in this notice.

rows.date: As per date of digital signature (25 June 2026, per office record)

rows.event: Applications received after the last date/time

content_sections.heading: Ajmer Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika: Project-Wise Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The table below lists the number of vacant Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika posts, along with the contact phone number and email ID, for each of the 12 Child Development Project (CDPO) offices in Ajmer district, as published in the notice. The grand total of vacant posts across all 12 projects is 105 - 34 Anganwadi Karyakartri and 71 Anganwadi Sahayika posts. (Note: In the original notice, the email ID listed for the Sarwar project office is the same as that of the Srinagar project office; this has been reproduced as printed in the source document.)

content_sections.heading: Legal and Administrative Basis of the Notice
content_sections.text: This recruitment notice has been issued in accordance with: The recruitment circular for honorarium-based workers issued by the Directorate, Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS), Jaipur - Circular No. P.11(3)10/Mahila/ICDS/2022/4244, dated 12 January 2023. The guideline letter No. P.11/(3)10/Mahila/ICDS/2022/57871-58286, dated 1 March 2024. Instructions issued by the Directorate from time to time.

content_sections.heading: Anganwadi Centre-Wise Vacancy List (Annexure-A): Available Details
content_sections.text: The official notice includes a detailed Annexure listing vacant posts by Anganwadi Centre, village/ward, and reserved category, for each project office. The uploaded pages of the notice contain this detailed list for the following projects. All figures below are exactly as printed in the source document. Important note: The uploaded copy of the notice is cut off after this point. The complete centre-wise list for the Srinagar project, as well as the full Anganwadi centre-wise breakdown for the Bhinay, Kekri, Sawar, and Sarwar projects, is not available in the source pages provided. As the notice itself states, complete project-wise/centre-wise/Gram Panchayat-wise/ward-wise vacancy and eligibility details are available on the department's website, http://www.wcd.rajasthan.gov.in, and on the notice board of the respective Child Development Project Office.

tables.caption: 1. Ajmer City Project (Municipal Corporation, Ajmer) - Total: 02 Karyakartri, 12 Sahayika
3. Kishangarh Rural Project - Total: 02 Karyakartri, 07 Sahayika
6. Kishangarh City Project (Municipality, Kishangarh) - Total: 04 Karyakartri, 08 Sahayika
7. Srinagar Project (Municipality, Nasirabad) - Partial List (as available in the uploaded pages)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility, Age Limit, Educational Qualification, and Honorarium
content_sections.text: The notice uploaded and translated here does not specify the following details: Educational qualification required for Anganwadi Karyakartri or Sahayika posts Age limit or age relaxation Monthly honorarium (मानदेय) amount for either post Detailed eligibility/selection criteria The notice explicitly states that such detailed eligibility information is available on the departmental website, http://www.wcd.rajasthan.gov.in . Candidates should refer to that website or contact the relevant CDPO office (numbers listed above) for these details rather than assuming any criteria.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Ajmer Anganwadi Karyakartri/Sahayika Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Obtain the application form as prescribed by the department (format not included in the uploaded notice - check the departmental website or the relevant CDPO office). Attach all required supporting documents to the application (specific list of documents is not detailed in the uploaded notice). Submit the hard copy of the application, along with attached documents, in person to the office of the Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) relevant to the project/area of the vacancy you are applying for. Applications must be submitted between 25 June 2026 and 24 July 2026 , up to 5:00 PM . Applications received after this period will not be accepted under any circumstances. For general queries about the notice, contact the relevant project office's phone number during office hours on government working days. Note: This notice specifies only an offline (hard copy, in-person) submission process to the respective CDPO office. No online application portal or email-based submission process is mentioned in the notice for candidates.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The hard copy of the application, along with all attached/supporting documents, must be submitted in person at the office of the concerned Child Development Project Officer. The application window is strictly from 25 June 2026 to 24 July 2026, till 5:00 PM. No applications will be accepted after this deadline. For general information about the notice, candidates can contact the listed phone numbers during office hours on government working days. Detailed information regarding project-wise, Anganwadi-centre-wise, Gram Panchayat-wise, and ward-wise vacancies and eligibility can be obtained from the departmental website: http://www.wcd.rajasthan.gov.in. The issuing authority (Deputy Director, Women and Child Development Department, Ajmer) reserves the right to amend, delete, or cancel this notice in any manner, at any time.

content_sections.heading: Distribution / Copy Forwarded To
content_sections.text: As per the notice, copies have been forwarded for information and necessary action to: The Director, Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS), Rajasthan, Jaipur. The District Collector, Ajmer. The Chief Executive Officer, Zila Parishad, Ajmer - with a request to direct subordinate Development Officers to publicize the notice. The Deputy Director (ICP), Integrated Child Development Services, Rajasthan, Jaipur - with a request to upload the notice on the departmental website. Commissioners of Municipal Bodies of Ajmer, Nasirabad, Kishangarh City, Kekri, Sarwar, Tantoti, Pushkar, Peesangan, and others - for publicity of the notice. All Child Development Project Officers in Ajmer district - with a request to paste the notice at the concerned sub-division office, tehsil, municipal body, panchayat samiti, and Gram Panchayat Anganwadi centres for wider publicity, and to send a compliance report along with photographs.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Ajmer Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application in person at the concerned CDPO office is 24 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in this Ajmer Anganwadi recruitment notice?
faq.answer: There are 105 total vacant posts - 34 Anganwadi Karyakartri (Worker) posts and 71 Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper) posts - spread across 12 Child Development Project offices in Ajmer district.

faq.question: Q3. Is this a salaried government job?
faq.answer: No. The notice describes these as voluntary, honorarium-based (मानदेय) service posts, not regular salaried government employment. The exact honorarium amount is not mentioned in the notice.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Anganwadi Karyakartri or Sahayika post in Ajmer?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted as a hard copy, along with the required documents, in person at the office of the Child Development Project Officer (CDPO) relevant to your project area, between 25 June 2026 and 24 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an online application process?
faq.answer: The notice does not mention any online application process. Only offline, in-person submission at the relevant CDPO office is specified.

faq.question: Q6. Which projects in Ajmer district have the most vacancies?
faq.answer: Based on the notice, Ajmer City has the highest number of Sahayika vacancies (12), while Kishangarh City has the highest number of Karyakartri vacancies (04), followed by Srinagar with 06 Karyakartri and 11 Sahayika vacancies.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the complete Anganwadi-centre-wise vacancy list?
faq.answer: The complete centre-wise list, including reserved categories for each Anganwadi Centre, is available at the notice board of the respective Child Development Project Office and on the departmental website, http://www.wcd.rajasthan.gov.in.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Ajmer Anganwadi Karyakartri and Sahayika Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application in person at the concerned CDPO office is 24 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.answer: No. The notice describes these as voluntary, honorarium-based (मानदेय) service posts, not regular salaried government employment. The exact honorarium amount is not mentioned in the notice.

faq.answer: The notice does not mention any online application process. Only offline, in-person submission at the relevant CDPO office is specified.
